easy.title: Responsive Card Layout
easy.description: Create a responsive card layout using CSS Grid auto-fit/minmax. Start with single column on mobile and automatically increase columns on larger screens. Minimum 6 cards with image placeholder, title, and description.
easy.starterCode: <!DOCTYPE html><html lang="en"><head><meta charset="UTF-8"><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"><title>Responsive Cards</title><style>/* Auto-fit grid */</style></head><body><section class="card-grid"><!-- 6 cards --></section></body></html>

medium.title: Mobile-First Landing Page
medium.description: Build a complete landing page using mobile-first approach. Start with mobile CSS (single column, stacked), then add breakpoints for tablet (2 columns) and desktop (3 columns + sidebar). Sections: Hero, Features (3 items), Testimonials (2), Pricing (3 plans), Footer.
medium.starterCode: <!DOCTYPE html><html lang="en"><head><meta charset="UTF-8"><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"><title>Mobile-First Landing</title><style>/* Mobile-first styles */</style></head><body><!-- Sections --></body></html>

hard.title: Full Responsive Dashboard with Container Queries
hard.description: Build an admin dashboard that uses container queries (@container) for widget components. The dashboard has a sidebar, header, and main grid of widgets (stats, chart, recent activity, tasks). Each widget should use container queries to adapt its layout based on available space.
hard.starterCode: <!DOCTYPE html><html lang="en"><head><meta charset="UTF-8"><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"><title>Container Queries Dashboard</title><style>/* Container queries */</style></head><body><!-- Dashboard layout --></body></html>
